linksInfo: Add social media references, or any other link related to the location
geocodeError: The geolocation was not successful. Please retry or place the marker manually
disabledGeocode: The automatic localization is temporarily unavailable. Drag the marker to the correct location on the map manually.
name: Name of the location
addressPlaceholder: Number Street, City (example : 82 Boulevard de Clichy, Paris)
imageInfo: Only upload images you have the right to re-use
location.length: the length must be between %min% and %max% characters
noMapLocation: The geographical location is not yet defined
geocodeNoResults: We could not locate this address. Start over by typing the name of the town or city only, position the marker on the map in the right location and then specify the complete address once the marker is correctly placed.
loadingError: A problem occurred during the load. Please retry.
toverify: This location has to be verified
extIdInfo: Optionally, specify a unique identifier for this location
extIdLink: Define a unique identifier for this location
